_comment: ExplorerLens Scoop manifest — install all required build tools with one command: scoop import scoopfile.json

apps.Name: ninja
apps._purpose: Ninja build runner — default generator for all ExplorerLens CMake presets

apps.Name: nasm
apps._purpose: NASM assembler — required for dav1d and libjxl SIMD assembly

apps.Name: meson
apps._purpose: Meson build system — required by dav1d (AV1 decoder)

apps.Name: nuget
apps._purpose: NuGet package manager — WTL package for LENSManager

apps.Name: 7zip
apps._purpose: 7-Zip archive tool — used by build scripts for library extraction

apps.Name: wix
apps._purpose: WiX Toolset v3 — alternative MSI build path (WiX v6 preferred via dotnet tool)

notes: Visual Studio 2022 BuildTools (MSVC v143) or VS 2026 BuildTools (MSVC v145) must be installed separately via winget or the Visual Studio Installer.
Preferred local toolset: VS 18 2026 BuildTools (MSVC v145, cl.exe 19.50) — see .github/instructions/build.instructions.md
WiX v6 (preferred): dotnet tool install --global wix
Windows SDK 10.0.26100 is installed with VS BuildTools.
